name: Sausage Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 large Onion chopped with 1 cup water
recipeInstructions:
1. Let the dough rise until double in size. (about 4 hours)
2. Squeeze sausage meat from skin and crumble.
3. Sautee with onion and chopped pepper. Drain well.
4. Punch down dough and cut into half.
5. Roll into a rectangle.
6. Top with half meat and cheeses.
7. Roll up and place in shallow baking pan seam side down.
8. Repeat with other loaf.
9. Brush egg wash over both loaves.
10. Cut 3 slits 1 inch in each loaf.
11. Bake at 375°F for 25-30 minutes.
12. Serve warm.
